veto_codes.name: VETO_FORBIDDEN_FIELD
veto_codes.trigger: BRP contains any of: target_speed_mps, steering, throttle, brake, trajectory, acceleration_mps2, waypoints, control_surface
veto_codes.description: Agent attempted to bind a control-surface or kinematic field. Direct contract violation. Assist mode is suspended.

veto_codes.name: VETO_INVALID_INTENT
veto_codes.description: Agent produced a tactical intent not in the allowed set. BRP rejected. Baseline resumes.

veto_codes.name: VETO_NO_LC_PERMISSION
veto_codes.trigger: Agent recommends any lane-change intent AND Safety Spine reports lane_change_permission=False
veto_codes.description: Safety Spine has not cleared the lane change. AE overrides agent recommendation.

veto_codes.name: VETO_COLLISION_RISK
veto_codes.trigger: MPC geometry check detects TTC < 2.5s in agent's target lane or forward zone
veto_codes.description: Predicted collision risk if agent intent is executed. Physical safety override.

veto_codes.name: VETO_LOW_CONFIDENCE
veto_codes.description: Agent confidence too low for binding advisory. Auto-vetoed before AE review. BRP logged as advisory-only.

veto_codes.name: VETO_TEMPORAL_CONFLICT
veto_codes.trigger: BRP intent contradicts active_maneuver in temporal memory window (e.g., cancel committed LC mid-execution without abort signal)
veto_codes.description: Agent is attempting to thrash between intents while a maneuver is already committed. MPC overrides and continues the committed maneuver.

veto_codes.name: VETO_STOP_OVERRIDE_ATTEMPT
veto_codes.trigger: Agent recommends any non-stop intent AND Stop Spine is binding (binding_status=active)
veto_codes.description: Stop target is binding. Agent is not permitted to override stop authority. Hard veto.

veto_codes.name: VETO_STALE_BRP
veto_codes.description: BRP arrived for a frame that has already passed. Discarded silently. No disruption to current frame.

veto_codes.name: VETO_AUTHORITY_SCOPE_EXCEEDED
veto_codes.trigger: BRP.assist_scope != 'tactical_only' OR BRP attempts to modify MPC parameters directly
veto_codes.description: Agent attempted to exceed tactical binding scope. This is a contract breach. Assist mode suspended immediately.

veto_codes.name: VETO_RATE_LIMIT
veto_codes.trigger: More than 1 BRP submitted for the same frame_id
veto_codes.description: Only 1 BRP per frame is permitted. Extra packets are silently discarded. First valid BRP wins.
